basic_details.job_title: DMHO Jagtial Lab Technician Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: District Medical and Health Office (DMHO Jagtial) Lab Technician Notification 2026 has been released on the official website jagtial.telangana.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the DMHO Jagtial Lab Technician Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 46 years Age relaxation will be provided as per government rules. Age reckoning date is 01 July 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Intermediate (10+2) and Diploma or Certified course in Medical Laboratory Technology or equivalent. Graduates (B.Sc. (MLT)/M.Sc. (MLT)) are preferred.
qualification.details: Lab Technician: Intermediate (10+2) and Diploma or certified course in Medical Laboratory Technology or equivalent. Graduates (B.Sc. (MLT)/M.Sc. (MLT)) are preferred. One year experience in NTEP or Sputum Smear Microscopy is preferential.

selection_process: Merit Basis Based on Marks obtained in qualifying examination (90 Marks) Weightage for age (10 Marks)
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DMHO Jagtial Lab Technician Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://jagtial.telangana.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 08-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download DMHO Jagtial Lab Technician Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download DMHO Jagtial Lab Technician Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for DMHO Jagtial Lab Technician Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://jagtial.telangana.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 08-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DMHO Jagtial Lab Technician Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Lab Technician post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Lab Technician post is 08th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the office before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Lab Technician position?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed Intermediate (10+2) and possess a Diploma or Certified course in Medical Laboratory Technology or an equivalent qualification. Graduates in B.Sc. (MLT) or M.Sc. (MLT) are preferred.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 46 years as of 01st July 2026. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Lab Technician post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 27,300/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Lab Technician job?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline. You need to download the application form from the official website, fill it out, and submit it in person at the O/o District Medical & Health Officer, Jagtial.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee?
faq.answer: Yes, an application fee of Rs. 300/- is required. This fee should be paid through a Demand Draft in favour of the District Medical & Health Officer, Jagtial.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Lab Technician role?
faq.answer: The selection will be based on merit, considering marks obtained in the qualifying examination (90 Marks) and a weightage for age (10 Marks).

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Jagtial district: https://jagtial.telangana.gov.in.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: You need to attach self-attested copies of required documents, including a photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant certificates as mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. What is the total number of vacancies for the Lab Technician post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Lab Technician in DMHO Jagtial as per the released notification.
